Metadata.title: Voltage Festival — Indoor Electronic Music Experience
Metadata.description: Voltage Festival is an immersive indoor electronic music experience featuring world-class DJs, neon visuals, and nonstop energy.
Metadata.ogTitle: Voltage Festival — Feel the Pulse of the Night
Metadata.ogDescription: Step into the future of electronic music. DJs, neon lights, and an unforgettable indoor rave experience.

SplitScreen.description: Voltage isn't just a performance—it's a sensory overload engineered for the elite. Experience the fusion of high-precision audio and immersive laser mapping in a space designed to defy limits.

CoreComponents.title: THE CORE
CoreComponents.description: Engineered for those who seek the extreme. Voltage delivers a curated environment where technology meets visceral sound.

relentless.title: RELENTLESS
relentless.desc: Energy flow designed to never lose momentum.

hypnotic.title: HYPNOTIC
hypnotic.desc: A sensory vacuum at the heart of the night.

nocturnal.title: NOCTURNAL
nocturnal.desc: Mastering the darkness through light and sound.

transcendent.title: TRANSCENDENT
transcendent.desc: Pushing the boundaries of the physical rave.

2023.title: GENESIS
2023.desc: The initial spark gathering 3,000 attendees and 6 global DJs.

2024.title: NEON PULSE
2024.desc: Redefining immersion with neon ecosystems and interactive stages.

2025.title: MULTIVERSE
2025.desc: Expanding to four stages with VR-powered sensory visuals.

2026.title: FULL CHARGE
2026.desc: The ultimate peak featuring cutting-edge light technology.

Lineup.title: THE
Lineup.description: A curated selection of sonic engineers designed to push the boundaries of the nocturnal experience.

djs.supernova: An EDM powerhouse known for electrifying live performances.
djs.luma: A techno visionary crafting immersive soundscapes.
djs.bassline-x: Masters of bass-heavy beats that move the crowd.
djs.neon-flux: High-energy sets blending techno and electro.
djs.echo-pulse: Hypnotic rhythms designed for late-night journeys.
djs.vortex: Dark, driving techno with relentless momentum.
djs.aurora: Melodic electronic music with emotional depth.
djs.midnight-circuit: Fast-paced electronic beats built for peak time.

Trust.title: SECURE
Trust.description: Every detail at Voltage is engineered to ensure total safety without compromising the immersion of the rave.

medical.title: Medical.Support
medical.desc: Rapid response units stationed across all sectors for immediate intervention.

security.title: Tactical.Security
security.desc: Professional crew monitoring crowd flow and perimeter integrity 24/7.

extraction.title: Extraction.Points
extraction.desc: High-visibility, illuminated exit routes engineered for rapid evacuation.

venue.title: Venue.Integrity
venue.desc: Continuous monitoring and controlled access points across the facility.

standard.name: Standard.Access
standard.desc: Full single-entry protocol for all active stages.

vip.name: VIP.Tactical
vip.desc: Advanced entry protocol for groups of four with full priority.

duo.name: Duo.Sync
duo.desc: Synchronized entry protocol for dual-unit operation.

Testimonials.title: REAL
Testimonials.description: Direct reports from processed units during the previous cycles.

log1.quote: VOLTAGE IS HANDS DOWN THE BEST ELECTRONIC MUSIC FESTIVAL I'VE EVER ATTENDED.

log2.quote: THE ENERGY, THE LIGHTS, THE MUSIC — IT ALL FELT LIKE A DREAM COME TRUE.

log3.quote: EVERY BEAT, EVERY DROP, EVERY MOMENT WAS ABSOLUTELY PEAK PERFORMANCE.

items.q1: WHAT IS THE MINIMUM AGE TO ATTEND?
items.a1: VOLTAGE IS STRICTLY 18+ ONLY. A VALID GOVERNMENT-ISSUED PHOTO ID IS REQUIRED AT ENTRY FOR AGE VERIFICATION.
items.a2: A SECURE, ON-SITE PARKING LOT WILL BE AVAILABLE THROUGHOUT THE EVENT. AVAILABILITY IS LIMITED.
items.q3: CAN I BRING MY OWN FOOD OR DRINKS?
items.a3: OUTSIDE FOOD AND DRINKS ARE NOT PERMITTED. INSIDE THE VENUE, YOU’LL FIND CURATED FOOD TRUCKS AND BARS.
items.a4: SMARTPHONES AND SMALL PERSONAL CAMERAS ARE ALLOWED. PROFESSIONAL CAMERAS REQUIRE AN OFFICIAL PRESS PASS.
items.a5: RE-ENTRY IS NOT PERMITTED ONCE YOU LEAVE THE VENUE. PLEASE PLAN ACCORDINGLY.

Quote.text: The night belongs to those who feel the music.
Quote.author: — Nina Kraviz — DJ & Producer

MaskReveal.title: Frame the Feeling
MaskReveal.description: A night defined by connection, music, and energy.

Footer.description: The ultimate high-energy indoor electronic music experience. engineered for the nocturnal.
Footer.join: Join the high-voltage network for updates.
